Reset_v2
Reset_v2

Contains logic for the Reset_v2 Node command

Functions
buildCommand
static ByteStream buildCommand(
NodeAddress nodeAddress,
ResetType resetType
)

Builds the Reset_v2 command packet

Parameters
nodeAddress
NodeAddress

the address of the Node to build the command for

resetType
ResetType

The <ResetType>

Returns
